summary: A sun-soaked friends' getaway combining Goa's best beaches, water sports, colonial heritage, and legendary beach shack nights.

days.title: Arrival & North Goa Beaches

activities.name: Land at Goa Airport (GOI)
activities.notes: Cab to hotel ~30 min

activities.name: Lunch at Infantaria Pastry Shop
activities.notes: Legendary Goan-Portuguese café. Try the Bebinca.

activities.name: Calangute & Baga Beach
activities.notes: North Goa's most lively stretch

activities.name: Water Sports at Baga
activities.notes: Banana boat, jet ski, parasailing package

activities.name: Dinner at Tito's Lane Beach Shacks
activities.notes: Fresh grilled fish, prawn balchão, Kingfisher by the sea

days.travelTime: Airport to hotel: 30 min by cab

days.title: Heritage, Forts & Anjuna

activities.name: Breakfast at hotel
activities.notes: Included

activities.name: Old Goa Basilica of Bom Jesus
activities.notes: UNESCO World Heritage. St. Francis Xavier's remains are here.

activities.name: Se Cathedral & Church of St. Francis
activities.notes: Asia's largest church

activities.name: Lunch at Viva Panjim
activities.notes: Authentic Goan home cooking in the Latin Quarter

activities.name: Fontainhas Heritage Walk
activities.notes: Goa's charming Portuguese quarter with azulejo tiles

activities.name: Anjuna Flea Market (Wed only) / Anjuna Beach
activities.notes: Famous hippie market or beach if not Wednesday

activities.name: Sunset Dinner at Curlies, Anjuna
activities.notes: Iconic Goa beach party spot

days.travelTime: North Goa ↔ Old Goa: 40 min by cab

activities.name: Early start: Dudhsagar Waterfall Jeep Safari
activities.notes: India's 5th tallest waterfall. Monsoon season is best. Book in advance.

activities.name: Lunch at a spice plantation
activities.notes: Sahakari Spice Farm — lunch on banana leaf included

activities.name: Colva / Benaulim Beach (South Goa)
activities.notes: Far quieter than North Goa beaches — long white sand

activities.name: Fort Aguada Sunset Viewpoint
activities.notes: Best sunset viewpoint in Goa

activities.name: Dinner & Nightlife — Tito's Club / Club Cubana
activities.notes: Goa's legendary nightlife

activities.name: Breakfast & Beach Walk
activities.notes: Final Goan breakfast — egg fried rice from a shack

activities.name: Souvenir shopping at Mapusa Market
activities.notes: Cashews, Feni, spices, handicrafts

activities.name: Flight back to Mumbai (6E-836)
activities.notes: Late evening — maximise last hours in Goa

summary: A deeply romantic journey through paradise — floating on Dal Lake at dawn, meadows of Gulmarg, the Betaab Valley, and evenings on a carved walnut houseboat.

activities.name: Arrive Srinagar Airport
activities.notes: Cab to houseboat / hotel ~45 min

activities.name: Houseboat Check-in, Dal Lake
activities.notes: Traditional carved walnut houseboat — you live on the water

activities.name: Shikara Ride — Dal Lake
activities.notes: Floating vegetable markets, lotus gardens, bird islands

activities.name: Sunset on Houseboat Deck
activities.notes: Khawa tea served as mountains turn orange

activities.name: Dinner on Houseboat (Wazwan Meal)
activities.notes: Included — traditional Kashmiri multi-course feast

activities.name: Sunrise Shikara Ride
activities.notes: Misty morning on Dal — the most beautiful hour in Kashmir

activities.name: Drive to Gulmarg
activities.notes: 50km from Srinagar through pine forests

activities.name: Gulmarg Gondola — Phase 1 & 2
activities.notes: World's 2nd highest gondola. Phase 2 reaches 4200m.

activities.name: Lunch at Hotel Highland Park, Gulmarg
Pony Ride in Gulmarg Meadows
activities.notes: Vast flower-filled meadows ringed by snow peaks

activities.name: Dinner at Ahdoos Restaurant
activities.notes: Srinagar's most famous restaurant. Must order Rogan Josh.

activities.name: Breakfast & drive to Pahalgam
activities.notes: 95km through Anantnag. Stunning Lidder River road.

activities.name: Betaab Valley (named after Sunny Deol film)
activities.notes: Gorgeous Bollywood-famous valley with ice-cold stream

activities.name: Lunch at Forest View Café, Pahalgam
activities.notes: Fresh trout — fished from Lidder River that morning

activities.name: Aru Valley & Baisaran Meadow (Mini Switzerland)
activities.notes: Lush meadow above treeline with stunning snow peaks

activities.name: Lidder River Walk
activities.notes: Walk along the river as it turns golden. Very romantic.

activities.name: Nishat Bagh (Garden of Bliss)
activities.notes: 12-terraced Mughal garden on Dal lakeshore

activities.name: Shalimar Bagh (Garden of Love)
activities.notes: Jahangir built this for his beloved Nur Jahan

activities.name: Lunch — Harissa at Peer Dastgir Sahib area
activities.notes: Traditional Kashmiri slow-cooked meat porridge — breakfast food that locals swear by

activities.name: Jama Masjid & Khanqah Shah Hamdan
activities.notes: Stunning medieval mosque and Sufi shrine in old city

activities.name: Lal Chowk & Kashmiri Handicraft Shopping
activities.notes: Pashmina shawls, carpets, walnut woodwork, papier-mâché

activities.name: Final Houseboat Dinner — Special Wazwan
activities.notes: Included — the full 36-course Wazwan experience

activities.name: Early drive to Sonamarg
activities.notes: 80km from Srinagar — dramatic mountain highway

activities.name: Thajiwas Glacier Pony / Walk
activities.notes: Year-round glacier walk. Take snowboots if available.

activities.name: Lunch at Sonamarg tourist camp dhabas
activities.notes: Basic but hearty Kashmiri dal, rice and naan

activities.name: Sindh River Valley Drive & views
activities.notes: The river valley at Sonamarg is breathtakingly beautiful

activities.name: Farewell dinner — Lhasa Restaurant, Srinagar
activities.notes: Tibetan cuisine overlooking Dal Lake

activities.name: Sunrise Shikara — Floating Flower Market
activities.notes: The floating flower and vegetable market at dawn. One of India's most magical sights.

activities.name: Kashmiri breakfast on houseboat
activities.notes: Included — noon chai, girda bread, eggs

activities.name: Check out & shopping for Kahwa, saffron
activities.notes: Buy real Kashmiri saffron and Kahwa tea — best gifts from Kashmir

activities.name: Depart Srinagar
activities.notes: Flight home

summary: Gaudí's surreal architecture, the electric Gothic Quarter, a foodie's paradise, and the crystalline Costa Brava coastline — Catalonia's greatest hits in 7 unforgettable days.

days.title: Arrival & Gothic Quarter

activities.name: Arrive Barcelona El Prat (BCN)
activities.notes: Aerobus to city centre — 35 min, €5.90

activities.name: Dinner at El Xampanyet, El Born
activities.notes: Barcelona's most beloved tapas bar. House cava is legendary.

days.travelTime: Airport to city centre: 35 min by Aerobus

days.title: Gaudí Masterpieces
days.theme: Top Rated — A full day of surreal architecture

activities.name: Sagrada Família (skip-the-line, towers included)
activities.notes: Book months ahead. The most visited monument in Spain.

activities.name: Brunch at La Boqueria Market
activities.notes: Freshest jamón, Manchego, seafood and fruit in Europe

activities.name: Park Güell
activities.notes: Mosaic terraces, gingerbread gatehouses, city panorama. Book timed entry.

activities.name: Casa Batlló or Casa Milà (La Pedrera) exterior walk
activities.notes: One of Gaudí's greatest apartment buildings — the roof is spectacular

activities.name: Dinner in Gràcia neighbourhood
activities.notes: Barcelona's most charming village-within-a-city

activities.name: Gothic Quarter Morning Walk
activities.notes: Guided walking tour through Barcelona's 2000-year-old Roman core

activities.name: Barcelona Cathedral
activities.notes: Free entry early morning. The cloister with 13 geese is magical.

activities.name: Lunch at Bar del Pla, El Born
activities.notes: Best pintxos in El Born. Try the foie with Pedro Ximénez.

activities.name: Picasso Museum
activities.notes: Traces Picasso's formative Barcelona years in a medieval palace

activities.name: Barceloneta Beach & Seafront
activities.notes: Swim, walk, watch the city from the sea

activities.name: Barcelona Fountain Show (Montjuïc)
activities.notes: Magic Fountain — free light and water show Thu–Sun

activities.name: Dinner at Bodega Sepúlveda
activities.notes: Authentic Catalan bodega with house vermut and anchovies

days.title: Montserrat Day Trip

activities.name: Train to Montserrat (Aeri or Cremallera)
activities.notes: Round trip train from Plaça Espanya includes rack railway or cable car

activities.name: Montserrat Monastery & Black Madonna
activities.notes: 900-year-old monastery. The famous La Moreneta is inside.

activities.name: Sant Joan Trail hike (panoramic ridge)
activities.notes: 45-min uphill — 360° views over Catalonia and the Med

activities.name: Lunch at the monastery café / picnic
Return to Barcelona
activities.notes: Included in train pass

activities.name: Dinner — Cal Pep, El Born (seafood)
activities.notes: Barcelona's best seafood counter. Arrive at opening or wait an hour.

days.travelTime: Plaça Espanya to Montserrat: 1hr 15min by train

days.title: Costa Brava — Tossa de Mar

activities.name: Drive / Bus to Tossa de Mar
activities.notes: 105km north of Barcelona. Bus from Estació del Nord.

activities.name: Vila Vella — Medieval Walled Town
activities.notes: Only inhabited fortified medieval town on the Costa Brava. Stunning.

activities.name: Lunch of grilled fish at Sa Muralla restaurant
activities.notes: Grilled sea bass and local wine on the terrace of the old walls

activities.name: Playa de Tossa swimming & sunbathing
activities.notes: The most beautiful beach on the Costa Brava

activities.name: Coastal Walk to Cap de Tossa Lighthouse
activities.notes: Walk the cliff path to the lighthouse for golden hour views

days.travelTime: Barcelona to Tossa de Mar: 1.5 hrs

days.title: Camp Nou, Tibidabo & Nightlife
days.theme: Football, panoramic views & Barcelona by night

activities.name: Camp Nou Tour & FC Barcelona Museum
activities.notes: Walk the famous pitch. The museum traces Barça's entire history.

activities.name: Lunch at Cervecería Catalana
activities.notes: Barcelona's best casual tapas. The croquetas are unmissable.

activities.name: Tibidabo Amusement Park & Church
activities.notes: Vintage amusement park on Barcelona's highest hill. The view of the entire city is stunning.

activities.name: Sunset Gin Tonic at a Rooftop Bar (Hotel 1898)
activities.notes: Barcelona specialises in elaborate gin and tonics. This is the city's best rooftop.

days.title: El Raval, Brunch & Departure

activities.name: Brunch at Federal Café, El Raval
activities.notes: Barcelona's brunch institution. Avocado toast was practically invented here.

activities.name: MACBA (Contemporary Art Museum) exterior
activities.notes: Even if you don't go in — the skateboarders outside are Barcelona's most authentic sight

activities.name: Final shopping — El Raval & Passatge de la Concepció
activities.notes: Local design stores, Catalan olive oil, wine and cured meats

activities.name: Transfer to Barcelona Airport
activities.notes: Taxi or Aerobus

days.travelTime: City centre to BCN Airport: 35-45 min

summary: Two nights in the world's oldest living city — a profound journey through the ghats, ancient rituals, Ganga Aarti, and the timeless philosophy of Varanasi.

days.title: Arrival & Evening Ganga Aarti

activities.name: Arrive Varanasi Airport (VNS)
activities.notes: Smart pick: early morning flight. Cab to ghats — 30 min.

activities.name: Dashashwamedh Ghat Morning Walk
activities.notes: The soul of Varanasi. Watch bathing rituals, sadhus, flower sellers.

activities.name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple Darshan
activities.notes: One of the 12 Jyotirlinga shrines. Most sacred Shiva temple in India.

activities.name: Lunch at Darbhanga Restaurant
activities.notes: Excellent Banarasi thali with thandai and kachori

activities.name: Boat Ride to Manikarnika Ghat
activities.notes: The cremation ghat — a confrontation with impermanence that changes you

activities.name: Dashashwamedh Ghat — Ganga Aarti
activities.notes: The most spectacular religious ceremony in India. 7 priests, fire, drums, devotion. Arrive 30 min early.

activities.name: Dinner at Baati Chokha
activities.notes: Authentic Banarasi food — baati, chokha, dal and ghee

days.travelTime: Airport to Ghats: 30 min by cab

days.title: Sarnath & Silk Lanes

activities.name: Pre-dawn Boat Ride on the Ganges
activities.notes: Watching Varanasi wake up from the river at dawn is the defining experience of India

activities.name: Breakfast — Kachori Sabzi & Lassi
activities.notes: Eat at any street stall near the ghats. Genuinely incredible.

activities.name: Sarnath — Where Buddha delivered first sermon
activities.notes: Dhamek Stupa, Sarnath Museum, Deer Park. UNESCO site.

activities.name: Silk Weaving Lanes of Varanasi
activities.notes: Watch master weavers create Banarasi silk saris. The finest fabric in India.

activities.name: Ramnagar Fort & Museum
activities.notes: Maharaja of Banaras' residence across the river. Museum of vintage cars, arms, costumes.

activities.name: Mithail at Blue Lassi Shop + evening walk
activities.notes: 100-year-old lassi shop — the Malaiyyo (cold cream dessert) in winter is extraordinary

days.travelTime: Varanasi to Sarnath: 15 min by auto

activities.name: Sunrise Boat Ride — Golden Ganges
activities.notes: The Ganges at sunrise glows gold. Non-negotiable.

activities.name: Depart Varanasi (6E-2216)
activities.notes: Smart pick: late evening departure. Attend Ganga Aarti one final time before flying home.

summary: The ultimate luxury honeymoon — private overwater villas, swimming with whale sharks, glowing bioluminescent beaches, and dining 6 metres beneath the Indian Ocean.

activities.name: Seaplane to Resort
activities.notes: Included by resort. Flying low over the atolls is a magical arrival.

activities.name: Overwater Villa Check-in
activities.notes: Your private deck opens directly to the Indian Ocean. The glass floor panel reveals the reef below.

activities.name: First snorkel from villa deck
activities.notes: Masks and fins provided. The house reef starts at your steps.

activities.name: Sunset cocktails on private deck
activities.notes: Included — your butler arranges champagne and canapés

activities.name: Dinner at over-water restaurant
activities.notes: Included — glass floor panels below your table reveal reef fish swimming

activities.name: Sunrise yoga on the overwater platform
activities.notes: Complimentary with stay

activities.name: Whale Shark Excursion Boat
activities.notes: South Ari Atoll is the world's best spot for year-round whale shark encounters. Guaranteed sightings.

activities.name: Lunch at beach restaurant
activities.notes: Included

activities.name: Couples Spa Treatment
activities.notes: Overwater spa pavilion. Hot stone massage with ocean sounds below.

activities.name: Sandbank Dinner (pre-book)
activities.notes: Candlelit dinner on a private sandbank surrounded by ocean. The most romantic meal of your life.

activities.name: Scuba Diving — Coral Garden & Manta Point
activities.notes: Two dives with certified guides. The Maldives has some of the world's richest reefs.

activities.name: Lunch — traditional Maldivian fish curry on the beach
activities.notes: Included

activities.name: Glass-bottom kayaking over the reef
activities.notes: See reef sharks, turtles and rays without getting wet

activities.name: Sunset Dolphin Cruise
activities.notes: Spinner dolphins are almost guaranteed at sunset in the Maldives

activities.name: Bioluminescent Beach Walk
activities.notes: Vaadhoo Island (nearby atoll) is famous for glowing blue phytoplankton. Ask resort for excursion.

activities.name: Maldivian Cooking Class
activities.notes: Learn to make mas huni, rihaakuru and coconut curries

activities.name: Picnic on a neighbouring uninhabited island
activities.notes: Your own private island for the afternoon. Just you, the sand, and the ocean.

activities.name: Dinner at Ithaa Undersea Restaurant
activities.notes: 6 metres below the ocean surface — acrylic tunnel restaurant with 180° reef views. Book months ahead.

activities.name: Champagne breakfast in the villa
activities.notes: Ordered to the room. Included.

activities.name: His & Hers Spa Day
activities.notes: Full body wrap, facial, and Maldivian coconut oil treatment

activities.name: Final romantic dinner at beach restaurant
activities.notes: Included. Barefoot dining on the beach.

days.title: Farewell Paradise
days.theme: One last swim in the lagoon

activities.name: Last sunrise from villa deck
activities.notes: Watch the Indian Ocean turn from silver to gold

activities.name: Final snorkel from villa steps
activities.notes: The turtle always comes at 9am. Ask your butler.

activities.name: Check out & gift shop
activities.notes: Maldivian sea glass jewellery makes the best memory gift

activities.name: Seaplane back to Malé
activities.notes: Included

days.travelTime: Resort to Malé Airport: 30 min seaplane
